Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Text: Now, lets see which cases are significantly longer than average: 101: much shorter 102: longer than average 103: much shorter 104: longer than average 105: much longer than average So cases 102, 104, and 105 have significantly longer resolution times

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
